final_hypothesis.mechanism: Android 10 within the old-device cohort causes pre-cart application crashes; device age alone is not sufficient.
evidence:
DuckDB test returned 25 affected users; query=SELECT device_tier,
                   COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users,
                   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN outcome = 'crash' THEN user_id END) AS crash_users,
                   COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN outcome = 'crash' THEN user_id END)::DOUBLE
                       / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS crash_rate
            FROM events GROUP BY device_tier ORDER BY device_tier
DuckDB test returned 25 affected users; query=SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM events WHERE device_tier = 'old' AND os = 'Android_10' AND outcome = 'crash' ORDER BY user_id
confounders_ruled_out: device tier alone; OS-stratified falsification check performed

confounders_found: OS confounding / Simpson-style aggregate risk: old-device crashes concentrate in Android_10 (0.287 vs 0.000).

state_trace.mechanism: Old device hardware directly causes pre-cart application crashes.

state_trace.query: SELECT device_tier, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS users, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN outcome = 'crash' THEN user_id END) AS crash_users, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN outcome = 'crash' THEN user_id END)::DOUBLE / COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS crash_rate FROM events GROUP BY device_tier ORDER BY device_tier

state_trace.confounder: OS confounding / Simpson-style aggregate risk: old-device crashes concentrate in Android_10 (0.287 vs 0.000).

state_trace.mechanism: Android 10 within the old-device cohort causes pre-cart application crashes; device age alone is not sufficient.
state_trace.used_disconfirming_evidence: OS confounding / Simpson-style aggregate risk: old-device crashes concentrate in Android_10 (0.287 vs 0.000).

state_trace.query: SELECT DISTINCT user_id FROM events WHERE device_tier = 'old' AND os = 'Android_10' AND outcome = 'crash' ORDER BY user_id
